channel.title: python on Luke Salamone's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in python on Luke Salamone's Blog

item.title: Managing Python Environments
item.description: Need to switch between python versions often? Use pyenv. Installing pyenv Run curl https://pyenv.run | bash from terminal to install pyenv. Check it’s installed correctly by running which pyenv. Install another python version Run pyenv install --list to see a list of available python versions. Once you’ve chosen a version install it like pyenv install 3.7.5 by substituting the version you want for 3.7.5. List installed python versions Run pyenv versions to check installed versions.
